form.formComment: Backs up 4 days after failing to impress last start; 6th (Fr2) over 2400m at this track beaten 6 m by Still Rockin (2:57.00) in 4yo+ on April 12 at $7.50. Showed ability the run before when he won by 1.4 m (Fr1) at Ascot Park Raceway (2:39.50) beating Always Be Bootie in on April 2 at $2. Drawn favourably and worth another chance.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr3) over 2400m at this track beaten 10 m by Still Rockin (2:57.00) in 4yo+ on April 12 at $18.10. Before that, 6th (Fr2) over 2400m at Wyndham Raceway beaten 10 m by Bettor Way (2:59.40) in 4yo+ on March 29 at $14.20. Can do a lot better in this suitable contest.

form.formComment: Backing up quickly since being well beaten this track over 2400m, 4 days ago before that 4th (Fr4) over 2200m at Ascot Park Raceway, beaten 10 m by Havtimewillfly (2:41.50) on March 1 at $15.70. Must do a lot more.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr6) over 2200m at Ascot Park Raceway beaten 16 m by Blaze Lightening (2:39.50) on April 2 at $8. At her previous start 6th (Fr8) over 2200m at Gore Raceway beaten 21 m by Leithen Louie (2:39.50) in 3yo+ on March 19 at $15.30. Great chance to bounce back.

previousStarts.class: 2YO+ R44 TO R47, R48 WITH COND.

form.formComment: Fair performance when beaten by 5.5 m finishing fourth behind Bettor Way at Wyndham Raceway over 2400m in a 4yo+ on March 29 at $5.10. Then a handy effort when beaten by 5 m finishing third behind Still Rockin at this track over 2400m in a 4yo+ on April 12 at $17.10. Continues to race well and expected to be in the finish.
